rulings.Case Title: FRANCOIS VARNAY VS. STEVEN RAPPORT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 2, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT STEVEN RAPPORT's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. Parties failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and Court's August 29, 2018 order directing the parties to deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to this motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 79 28TH STREET, LLC. VS. MICHAEL JUAREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 2, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANTs MICHAEL JUAREZ and CONSTANCE JUAREZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. SFRO requires that the notification be given to the owner/landlord. The Notice is defective as it incorrectly identifies Gail Halprin and the owner, as opposed to "79 28th Street, LLC." = (501/REQ)
